name: Saudade
overview: Kashi, a high school student who is heartbroken after breaking up with her lover, Daffa. It gets even more painful when Daffa approaches Kashi's best friend, Resty. When her feelings are broken, Kashi meets Akash, a rebellious student. Akash's presence is a turning point in Kashi's journey in finding love and her own identity.
